channel.title: PostgreSQL on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in PostgreSQL on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Logical backups with pg_dump
item.description: Back up PostgreSQL databases using the Plakar PostgreSQL integration and restore them.

item.title: Physical backups with pg_basebackup
item.description: Back up a PostgreSQL cluster using the Plakar PostgreSQL integration and restore it.
